# Prompt: Create a CloudFormation template for our complete application stack (VPC, EC2, RDS, S3, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure components. We'll add CloudWatch alarms and detailed monitoring after we deploy and verify the basic setup works.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

# This is a template file for creating an AWS stack with VPC (Virtual Private Cloud), EC2 instances, RDS instance(PostgreSQL in this case)  S3 Bucket & Load Balancer using Amazon CloudFormation and Infrastructure as Code. It includes alarm setup on cloudwatch under creation of resources
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-01-09' # Define the version syntax, you can use YAML/JSON compatible versions here but currently it is set to ‘2010-01-09’ (latest one) which supports current AWS CloudFormation capabilities
Transform: AmazonLinux2018.03-initial
Description: This template creates an EC2 instance in a VPC with RDS and S3 Bucket, Load Balancer & IAM roles for access management as well Monitoring via cloudwatch  at creation time of resources using AWS CloudFormation's INFRA_STRUCTURE capabilities. The setup includes alarm monitoring
Parameters: # List the parameters used in this template (you can add more if necessary) or remove them to create a standalone stack with all default values for testing purpose only
